item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min The European Tour returns this weekend!
Watch live on PDCTV from 1200 BST, with a host of former champions in action on Day One in Sindelfingen!
http:// bit.ly/4cN4ZQa 5 847

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 6min Snooker fans everywhere are once again, quite correctly, wishing each other a Happy
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 6min Snooker fans everywhere are once again, quite correctly, wishing each other a Happy Crucible Eve.
Sheffield's legendary 17 day Championship of the World begins at ten o'clock tomorrow morning.
#Snooker 2 2 51

item.title:

item.description:
PDC Darts reposteó BetMGM UK @BetMGMUK · 53min Viva Darts Vegas!
We're giving 3 followers a pair of tickets to BetMGM Premier League Darts in Liverpool 𝗔𝗡𝗗 the chance to 𝗪𝗜𝗡 𝗔 𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗣 𝗧𝗢 𝗩𝗘𝗚𝗔𝗦

25+ | T&Cs apply | @OfficialPDC 1 1 3 1 mil

item.title:

item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 13min “There’s just too much pressure on him. It’s a real struggle for him at the moment.”
Luke Humphries is being told he may be “trying too hard” in the Premier League.
